description: Terraform S3 bucket with public-read ACL exposes data to the internet.
fix_hint: Remove public ACL; use bucket policy with least-privilege access.

description: Terraform S3 bucket with public-read-write ACL allows anyone to write objects.
fix_hint: Set acl = "private" and use IAM policies for access control.

description: S3 bucket without server-side encryption at rest risks data exposure if accessed.
fix_hint: Add server_side_encryption_configuration with aws:kms or AES256.

description: S3 bucket versioning disabled prevents recovery from accidental deletion or overwrite.
fix_hint: Set versioning { enabled = true } for data protection.

description: S3 bucket without access logging prevents forensic investigation of data access.
fix_hint: Add logging { target_bucket = aws_s3_bucket.log_bucket.id } block.

description: S3 public access block disabled allows public exposure of bucket contents.
fix_hint: Set all four block_public_* fields to true in aws_s3_bucket_public_access_block.

description: S3 bucket without MFA delete allows unauthorized version deletion.
fix_hint: Enable mfa_delete = true in the versioning block.

description: Security group allows inbound traffic from any IP (0.0.0.0/0).
fix_hint: Restrict cidr_blocks to known IP ranges or VPC CIDR.

description: Security group allows inbound traffic from any IPv6 address.
fix_hint: Restrict ipv6_cidr_blocks to specific IPv6 ranges.

description: SSH port 22 open to the internet enables brute-force attacks on servers.
fix_hint: Restrict SSH access to VPN/bastion host CIDR blocks only.

description: RDP port 3389 open to the internet enables remote desktop brute-force attacks.
fix_hint: Restrict RDP access to VPN CIDR blocks; use AWS SSM for remote access.

description: Database port open to the internet exposes database to unauthorized access.
fix_hint: Place databases in private subnets; restrict access to application security groups.

description: VPC without flow logs prevents detection of suspicious network activity.
fix_hint: Create an aws_flow_log resource for the VPC with CloudWatch or S3 destination.

description: EKS cluster with public API endpoint exposes Kubernetes API to the internet.
fix_hint: Set endpoint_public_access = false and use VPN/private endpoint.

description: ALB listener using HTTP instead of HTTPS transmits data in cleartext.
fix_hint: Use protocol = "HTTPS" with ssl_policy and certificate_arn.

description: ElastiCache without in-transit encryption allows traffic interception.
fix_hint: Set transit_encryption_enabled = true on the replication group.

description: ALB or CloudFront without WAF association lacks layer-7 attack protection.
fix_hint: Associate an aws_wafv2_web_acl with the ALB or CloudFront distribution.

description: Security group allows all outbound traffic enabling data exfiltration.
fix_hint: Restrict egress to required ports and destinations only.

description: IAM policy with Action:* and Effect:Allow grants full AWS access.
fix_hint: Follow least-privilege principle; specify only required Actions.

description: Terraform IAM statement with Allow and wildcard actions is overpermissive.
fix_hint: Enumerate specific actions needed instead of using wildcard.

description: IAM policy with Resource:* applies permissions to all resources.
fix_hint: Scope resources to specific ARNs using least-privilege.

description: Lambda with AdministratorAccess policy can perform any AWS action.
fix_hint: Create a custom IAM role with only the permissions the Lambda needs.

description: IAM inline policy on user is harder to audit than managed policies.
fix_hint: Use aws_iam_group_policy_attachment with managed policies instead.

description: IAM user without MFA condition allows single-factor authentication.
fix_hint: Add condition { test = "Bool" variable = "aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent" values = ["true"] }.

description: IAM role trust policy with wildcard principal allows any entity to assume the role.
fix_hint: Restrict Principal to specific AWS account IDs or service principals.

description: Cross-account role trust without conditions allows any principal in that account.
fix_hint: Add Condition with aws:PrincipalArn or externalId for cross-account access.

description: IAM policy granting iam:* allows creating new admins and backdoor accounts.
fix_hint: Grant only specific IAM actions needed (iam:PassRole, iam:GetRole, etc.).

description: Creating access keys for root account bypasses all IAM restrictions.
fix_hint: Never create access keys for root; use IAM users/roles instead.

description: RDS instance publicly accessible exposes database to internet-based attacks.
fix_hint: Set publicly_accessible = false and access via private subnet or VPN.

description: AWS account without CloudTrail loses all API activity audit trail.
fix_hint: Create an aws_cloudtrail resource with multi-region and S3 logging.

description: SQS queue without KMS encryption exposes message content at rest.
fix_hint: Set kms_master_key_id on the SQS queue for encryption at rest.

description: SNS topic without KMS encryption exposes notification content at rest.
fix_hint: Set kms_master_key_id on the SNS topic for encryption at rest.

description: ECR repository without image scanning misses known CVEs in container images.
fix_hint: Add image_scanning_configuration { scan_on_push = true }.

description: DynamoDB table without point-in-time recovery risks unrecoverable data loss.
fix_hint: Add point_in_time_recovery { enabled = true }.

description: KMS key without rotation increases risk from long-lived key material.
fix_hint: Set enable_key_rotation = true on the aws_kms_key.

description: Elasticsearch domain without encryption at rest exposes indexed data.
fix_hint: Set encrypt_at_rest { enabled = true } with a KMS key.

description: Redshift cluster without encryption at rest exposes data warehouse contents.
fix_hint: Set encrypted = true and specify a kms_key_id.

description: RDS without multi-AZ has no automatic failover on availability zone failure.
fix_hint: Set multi_az = true for production databases.

description: RDS without storage encryption exposes database files at rest.
fix_hint: Set storage_encrypted = true and specify kms_key_id.

description: Secrets hardcoded in .tfvars files are stored in plaintext and version control.
fix_hint: Use AWS Secrets Manager, HashiCorp Vault, or environment variables for secrets.

description: Local Terraform backend stores state on disk without encryption or team access.
fix_hint: Use backend "s3" with encryption and DynamoDB state locking.

description: S3 backend without encryption stores sensitive state data in plaintext.
fix_hint: Set encrypt = true in the S3 backend configuration.

description: Outdated AWS provider version may contain known security vulnerabilities.
fix_hint: Update to the latest AWS provider version and test for breaking changes.

description: Terraform state file in version control exposes secrets and infrastructure details.
fix_hint: Add *.tfstate to .gitignore and use remote state backend.

description: CloudFormation S3 bucket with public access control exposes data.
fix_hint: Remove AccessControl; use bucket policy with explicit deny for public access.

description: CloudFormation security group ingress open to all IPs.
fix_hint: Restrict CidrIp to known IP ranges or reference VPC CIDR parameter.

description: CloudFormation IAM policy with Action:* grants unrestricted permissions.
fix_hint: Specify only required actions following least-privilege principle.

description: CloudFormation RDS with PubliclyAccessible enables internet access to database.
fix_hint: Set PubliclyAccessible: false and place RDS in private subnet.

description: CloudFormation Lambda with administrator access can perform any AWS action.
fix_hint: Create a least-privilege execution role for the Lambda function.

description: CloudFormation ALB listener on HTTP without redirect to HTTPS.
fix_hint: Use Protocol: HTTPS with SslPolicy or redirect HTTP to HTTPS.

description: CloudFormation ECS task with privileged mode can escape container.
fix_hint: Set Privileged: false unless absolutely required for the workload.

description: CloudFormation stack without CloudTrail loses API audit visibility.
fix_hint: Add AWS::CloudTrail::Trail resource with multi-region and S3 logging.

description: CloudFormation S3 bucket without BucketEncryption stores data in plaintext.
fix_hint: Add BucketEncryption with SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms or AES256.

description: Cognito user pool with MFA disabled allows single-factor authentication.
fix_hint: Set MfaConfiguration: ON or OPTIONAL with SoftwareTokenMfa.

description: ARM storage account allowing HTTP enables man-in-the-middle attacks.
fix_hint: Set supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true on the storage account.

description: ARM NSG rule with wildcard source allows traffic from any IP.
fix_hint: Specify explicit source address prefix or service tag.

description: ARM NSG rule with wildcard destination allows traffic to any IP.
fix_hint: Specify explicit destination address prefix or service tag.

description: ARM Key Vault without soft delete allows permanent secret destruction.
fix_hint: Set enableSoftDelete: true and enablePurgeProtection: true.

description: ARM AKS without RBAC allows any authenticated user full cluster access.
fix_hint: Set enableRBAC: true on the AKS managedCluster resource.

description: ARM SQL Server without auditing loses database activity visibility.
fix_hint: Add Microsoft.Sql/servers/auditingSettings child resource.

description: ARM resource without diagnostic settings limits observability.
fix_hint: Add Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings child resource.

description: ARM storage account with public blob access exposes containers.
fix_hint: Set allowBlobPublicAccess: false on the storage account.

description: ARM SQL firewall rule allowing all IPs exposes database to internet.
fix_hint: Restrict IP range to known application and management IPs.

description: Pulumi S3 bucket with public ACL exposes data to the internet.
fix_hint: Remove public ACL; use bucket policy with least-privilege access.

description: Pulumi Python S3 bucket with public ACL exposes data.
fix_hint: Remove public ACL; use bucket policy with least-privilege access.

description: Pulumi security group open to all IPs on ingress.
fix_hint: Restrict cidrBlocks to known IP ranges.

description: Pulumi Python security group open to all IPs.
fix_hint: Restrict cidr_blocks to known IP ranges.

description: Pulumi IAM policy with wildcard action and Allow effect.
fix_hint: Specify only required IAM actions following least-privilege.

description: Pulumi RDS instance publicly accessible exposes database to internet.
fix_hint: Set publiclyAccessible: false and access via VPN/private network.

description: Pulumi Python RDS publicly accessible exposes database to internet.
fix_hint: Set publicly_accessible=False and use private subnets.

description: Pulumi S3 bucket without server-side encryption at rest.
fix_hint: Add serverSideEncryptionConfiguration with AES256 or aws:kms.

description: CloudFront without WAF lacks protection against DDoS and application attacks.
fix_hint: Associate an aws_wafv2_web_acl_association with the CloudFront distribution.

description: CloudFront allowing HTTP viewer connections transmits data in cleartext.
fix_hint: Set viewer_protocol_policy = "redirect-to-https" or "https-only".

description: API Gateway method with no authorization allows unauthenticated access.
fix_hint: Set authorization to AWS_IAM, COGNITO_USER_POOLS, or CUSTOM.

description: Lambda without VPC config has unrestricted internet access for data exfiltration.
fix_hint: Add vpc_config with private subnets and security groups.

description: EBS volume without encryption at rest exposes data on underlying storage.
fix_hint: Set encrypted = true and specify kms_key_id.

description: EFS filesystem without encryption at rest exposes shared file data.
fix_hint: Set encrypted = true on the EFS file system.

description: CloudFormation security group SSH open to internet enables brute-force.
fix_hint: Restrict SSH CidrIp to bastion host or VPN IP range.

description: CloudFormation security group RDP open to internet.
fix_hint: Restrict RDP CidrIp to VPN IP range; use AWS SSM for remote access.

description: CloudFormation KMS key without rotation increases key compromise risk.
fix_hint: Set EnableKeyRotation: true on the KMS key.

description: EC2 instance allowing IMDSv1 enables SSRF-based metadata credential theft.
fix_hint: Set http_tokens = "required" to enforce IMDSv2.

description: Secrets Manager secret without rotation policy uses long-lived credentials.
fix_hint: Add aws_secretsmanager_secret_rotation with a rotation Lambda.

description: RDS with no backup retention period risks unrecoverable data loss.
fix_hint: Set backup_retention_period to at least 7 for production databases.

description: RDS without deletion protection can be accidentally destroyed.
fix_hint: Set deletion_protection = true for production databases.

description: EC2 instance with public IP exposes it directly to internet traffic.
fix_hint: Use private subnets with NAT gateway; access via bastion or SSM.

description: CloudFormation EC2 instance with public IP address.
fix_hint: Place instances in private subnets; use NAT gateway for outbound.

description: OpenSearch domain without HTTPS enforcement transmits data in cleartext.
fix_hint: Set enforce_https = true in domain_endpoint_options.

description: CloudWatch log group without KMS encryption stores logs in plaintext.
fix_hint: Set kms_key_id on the CloudWatch log group for encryption.

description: Glue without encryption configuration exposes ETL data in transit and at rest.
fix_hint: Add encryption_configuration block with S3 and CloudWatch encryption.

description: Neptune cluster without storage encryption exposes graph data at rest.
fix_hint: Set storage_encrypted = true on the Neptune cluster.

description: DocumentDB cluster without encryption at rest exposes document data.
fix_hint: Set storage_encrypted = true on the DocumentDB cluster.

description: MSK cluster allowing plaintext client connections exposes Kafka messages.
fix_hint: Set client_broker = "TLS" to enforce encrypted connections.

description: SageMaker notebook without KMS encryption exposes ML data at rest.
fix_hint: Set kms_key_id on the SageMaker notebook instance.

description: SageMaker notebook with direct internet access enables data exfiltration.
fix_hint: Set direct_internet_access = "Disabled" and use VPC endpoints.

description: CloudFormation RDS without storage encryption exposes database at rest.
fix_hint: Set StorageEncrypted: true on the RDS instance.

description: CloudFormation DynamoDB table without server-side encryption.
fix_hint: Add SSESpecification: { SSEEnabled: true } with KMS key.

description: Pulumi EKS cluster with public API endpoint exposes Kubernetes to internet.
fix_hint: Set endpointPublicAccess: false and use private endpoint.

description: GuardDuty disabled loses threat detection for the AWS account.
fix_hint: Set enable = true on the GuardDuty detector.

description: AWS Config disabled loses continuous compliance monitoring.
fix_hint: Set is_enabled = true to enable continuous resource recording.

description: Athena workgroup without encryption exposes query results.
fix_hint: Add encryption_configuration with SSE_KMS in result_configuration.

description: Kinesis stream without encryption exposes streaming data.
fix_hint: Set encryption_type = "KMS" with a kms_key_id.

description: ARM Key Vault without purge protection allows permanent secret destruction.
fix_hint: Set enablePurgeProtection: true to prevent permanent deletion.

description: ARM Web App allowing HTTP traffic transmits data in cleartext.
fix_hint: Set httpsOnly: true on the Web App resource.

description: ARM resource with minimum TLS below 1.2 is vulnerable to protocol attacks.
fix_hint: Set minimumTlsVersion to "1.2" or higher.

description: ECR with mutable image tags allows overwriting images enabling supply chain attacks.
fix_hint: Set image_tag_mutability = "IMMUTABLE" to prevent tag overwrites.

description: Lambda environment variable with hardcoded secret is visible in state and console.
fix_hint: Use AWS Secrets Manager with dynamic reference; not hardcoded env vars.

description: RDS without IAM authentication requires static database passwords.
fix_hint: Set iam_database_authentication_enabled = true for token-based auth.

description: S3 bucket without lifecycle rules may accumulate stale data and increase costs.
fix_hint: Add lifecycle_rule with expiration for non-critical data and transition to Glacier.

description: ECS task without log configuration loses container output and error visibility.
fix_hint: Add logConfiguration with awslogs driver pointing to CloudWatch.

description: Cognito user pool without password policy allows weak user passwords.
fix_hint: Add password_policy with minimum_length >= 12 and require symbols/numbers.

description: SNS topic without access policy may use overly permissive defaults.
fix_hint: Add explicit SNS topic policy restricting publish/subscribe to specific principals.

description: CloudFormation S3 bucket without versioning risks unrecoverable data loss.
fix_hint: Add VersioningConfiguration: { Status: Enabled }.

description: CloudFormation IAM user with inline policies harder to audit than managed.
fix_hint: Use managed policies attached via groups instead of inline user policies.

description: WAFv2 without logging configuration prevents forensic analysis of blocked requests.
fix_hint: Add aws_wafv2_web_acl_logging_configuration resource with S3/CloudWatch destination.

description: Route53 zone without DNSSEC signing allows DNS spoofing attacks.
fix_hint: Enable DNSSEC signing on the Route53 hosted zone.

description: NLB listener using TCP without TLS transmits data in plaintext.
fix_hint: Use protocol = "TLS" with ssl_policy for encrypted network load balancing.

description: Pulumi Python IAM policy with wildcard action and Allow.
fix_hint: Specify only required IAM actions following least-privilege.

description: ALB using outdated 2016 SSL policy supports weak cipher suites.
fix_hint: Use ssl_policy = "ELBSecurityPolicy-TLS13-1-2-2021-06" or newer.

description: S3 CORS with wildcard origin allows any website to read bucket contents.
fix_hint: Restrict allowed_origins to specific trusted domains.

description: AWS Transfer Family using FTP instead of SFTP transmits files without encryption.
fix_hint: Use protocols = ["SFTP"] or ["FTPS"] for encrypted file transfer.
